summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ChatGPT-like URL auto-ingest feature. All core functionality working correctly including URL detection, auto-ingestion, auto-activation, citations, and UI indicators.
passed_tests: Auto-detect URLs in user messages using regex pattern
Auto-ingest detected URLs (fetch, extract, chunk, store)
Auto-activate newly ingested sources for current chat
Use newly ingested content immediately in same response
Reuse existing source if URL already ingested (no duplicate)
Update chat activeSourceIds with newly ingested sources
UI shows '1 URL auto-ingested' badge on user messages
Persist active sources per chat in DB
Multiple URLs in single message handling
Invalid URL handling (doesn't break message flow)
No auto-ingest when no URLs present
